name: rundrill-strategic-management
description: Strategic-management assistant for business owners — runs the whole 16-step strategy workflow for you, one step at a time, producing one verified artifact per step, inside your AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: A strategy assistant that runs the whole 16-step strategy process for a business owner, step by step.
interface.longDescription: Not a course — an assistant. It runs a proven 16-step strategic-management process FOR the owner so they never juggle prompts or lose the thread: it interviews you for your company context, then moves step by step — strategy audit, competitor recon, VRIO, market & customer research, foresight, business model (as-is/to-be), customer-development plan, strategy options, Balanced-Scorecard strategy map, KPI/OKR, Hoshin X-matrix, initiative decomposition, and a 12-month management-review rhythm. At each step it runs the work (web research inline where needed), gives you a short summary, writes the full artifact as a local Markdown file in your project folder, and waits for you to review and correct it before moving on — so your strategy is built only from artifacts you've verified. Backed by the RunDrill MCP engine, which holds your place in the process. Talks to you in Russian.
defaultPrompt: Помоги мне разработать стратегию моего бизнеса по шагам.
Давай соберём контекст моей компании и начнём.
Где мы остановились в работе над стратегией?
